languages.text: Барьер столь мощный, что выдержит и прямое попадание танкового снаряда. Не стоит тратить силы впустую.

traits.locale_text: Барьер столь мощный, что выдержит и прямое попадание танкового снаряда. Не стоит тратить силы впустую.

languages.text: The barrier is so powerful that it can withstand a direct hit from a tank shell. You do not want to waste your efforts.
languages.original_text: Барьер столь мощный, что выдержит и прямое попадание танкового снаряда. Не стоит тратить силы впустую.

traits.locale_text: The barrier is so powerful that it can withstand a direct hit from a tank shell. You do not want to waste your efforts.
The barrier is so powerful that it can withstand a direct hit from a tank shell. There is no point in wasting your efforts on it.
The field is so powerful that it can withstand a direct hit from a tank shell. You do not want to waste your efforts.
The barrier is so powerful that it can withstand a direct hit from a tank shell. You do not want to waste your efforts.
The barrier is so powerful that it can withstand a direct hit from a tank shell. There is no point in wasting your efforts on it.
The barrier is so powerful that it can withstand a direct hit from a tank shell. You do not want to waste your efforts.

languages.text: Die Barriere ist so stark, dass sie einem direkten Treffer einer Panzergranate standhalten kann. Du willst deine Kräfte nicht vergeuden.
languages.original_text: The barrier is so powerful that it can withstand a direct hit from a tank shell. You do not want to waste your efforts.

traits.locale_text: Die Barriere ist so stark, dass sie einem direkten Treffer einer Panzergranate standhalten kann. Du willst deine Kräfte nicht vergeuden.

languages.text: 这道屏障强大到足以承受住坦克正面炮击。你不想白费力气。
languages.original_text: The barrier is so powerful that it can withstand a direct hit from a tank shell. You do not want to waste your efforts.

traits.locale_text: 这道屏障强大到足以承受住坦克正面炮击。你不想白费力气。

languages.text: La barrière est si puissante qu'elle peut encaisser un tir direct de char d'assaut. Inutile de perdre votre temps.
languages.original_text: The barrier is so powerful that it can withstand a direct hit from a tank shell. You do not want to waste your efforts.

traits.locale_text: La barrière est si puissante qu'elle peut encaisser un tir direct de char d'assaut. Inutile de perdre votre temps.

languages.text: La barrera es tan potente que podría resistir el impacto directo de un obús de tanque. Prefieres no malgastar tus fuerzas en vano.
languages.original_text: The barrier is so powerful that it can withstand a direct hit from a tank shell. You do not want to waste your efforts.

traits.locale_text: La barrera es tan potente que podría resistir el impacto directo de un obús de tanque. Prefieres no malgastar tus fuerzas en vano.

languages.text: Bariyer o kadar güçlü ki doğrudan bir tank mermisine bile dayanabilir. Boşa çabalamak istemiyorsun.
languages.original_text: The barrier is so powerful that it can withstand a direct hit from a tank shell. You do not want to waste your efforts.

traits.locale_text: Bariyer o kadar güçlü ki doğrudan bir tank mermisine bile dayanabilir. Boşa çabalamak istemiyorsun.

languages.text: この障壁は非常に頑丈で、戦車の砲弾の直撃にも耐えることができます。無駄な努力はしたくありません。
languages.original_text: The barrier is so powerful that it can withstand a direct hit from a tank shell. You do not want to waste your efforts.

traits.locale_text: この障壁は非常に頑丈で、戦車の砲弾の直撃にも耐えることができます。無駄な努力はしたくありません。
